market_pulse: Strong Memorial Day weekend momentum across the Strip with major talent bookings (Tiësto, Calvin Harris, Diplo) driving engagement; Hakkasan and Encore leading MDW lineups with 5-day talent blocks, while LIV maintains John Summit brand presence but faces direct competition from Encore/Zouk on equivalent talent positioning.

content_gaps.suggested_action: Commission 2-3 bass-drop soundtracked reels featuring poolside visuals for weekend rotation
